text: 毎度あっさり引き受けてくれるよな……

もしかして、スゲー簡単な話なのかと
勘違いしそうになるけど……

そんなワケねーよな？
かなりやべー命がけの訓練だろ？

頼んどいてアレだけど
命を

You just snap up these orders every time
without missing a beat, don't ya pal?

Almost makes me think this is such
a cakewalk to you that you don't
even take it seriously.

But I'm just imagining things, right?
I mean, this is some high-stakes,
live-fire training, yeah?

I know I'm the one who asked you to do it,
but, y'know... watch yourself out there.
